title: Junior Frontend Engineer
description:
We are seeking a Junior Frontend Engineer to join our dynamic team. As a Junior Frontend Engineer, you will be responsible for developing high-quality web applications that meet our company's standards.

Responsibilities:
- Develop responsive web applications using HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript
- Collaborate with designers to implement visually appealing UI components
- Participate in code reviews and contribute to the improvement of our codebase
- Troubleshoot and debug issues reported by users
- Stay up-to-date with the latest frontend development trends and best practices

Must-have skills:
- JavaScript
- HTML5
- CSS3
- Bootstrap
- Webpack
- GitHub

Nice to have:
- TypeScript
- WebStorm
- CI/CD
